content:
You are a senior full-stack engineer and product designer.

Build a production-ready, modern, AI-powered Project Management System similar to Asana / [Monday.com](http://Monday.com).

The application must be visually stunning, highly aesthetic, minimal, and follow modern SaaS design principles.

\========================

🔷 TECH STACK

\========================

Frontend:

\- Next.js 14 (App Router)

\- TypeScript

\- Tailwind CSS

\- ShadCN UI components

\- Framer Motion (animations)

\- React Hook Form

\- Zustand (state management)

Backend:

\- Node.js

\- Express OR Next.js API routes

\- Prisma ORM

\- PostgreSQL (or Supabase)

Authentication:

\- NextAuth.js (Google + Email login)

AI Integration:

\- OpenAI API (GPT-4)

\- Used for:

\- Task summarization

\- Weekly project summary

\- Auto task description generation

\- Risk detection insights

Deployment ready for:

\- Vercel (Frontend)

\- Railway / Supabase (Database)

\========================

🔷 CORE FEATURES

\========================

1️⃣ Dashboard

\- Overview cards:

\- Total Projects

\- Total Tasks

\- Completed Tasks

\- Pending Tasks

\- Overdue Tasks

\- Animated progress charts

\- Recent activity feed

2️⃣ Project Management

\- Create / Edit / Delete projects

\- Fields:

\- Title

\- Description

\- Due date

\- Status (Active, Completed, On Hold)

\- Team members

\- Priority

3️⃣ Task Management

\- Create tasks under projects

\- Fields:

\- Title

\- Description

\- Assigned user

\- Priority (Low / Medium / High / Critical)

\- Status (Todo / In Progress / Done)

\- Due date

\- Estimated hours

\- Tags

\- Drag and drop Kanban board

\- Task filtering and search

4️⃣ AI Features

\- Button: “Generate Task Summary”

\- Button: “Generate Weekly Project Report”

\- AI Risk Alert:

\- Detect overdue or high workload

\- AI Task Breakdown:

\- Convert description into subtasks automatically

5️⃣ Team Collaboration

\- Invite team members

\- Role system:

\- Admin

\- Project Manager

\- Member

\- Comments under tasks

\- Activity timeline

6️⃣ Analytics Page

\- Task completion chart

\- Productivity trend

\- Workload distribution per user

\- Project progress %

\========================

🔷 UI / UX REQUIREMENTS

\========================

Design Style:

\- Clean SaaS dashboard

\- Glassmorphism cards

\- Soft shadows

\- Rounded corners (2xl)

\- Smooth animations

\- Professional color palette:

\- Primary: Indigo / Blue

\- Accent: Emerald

\- Background: Light Gray gradient

Sidebar:

\- Collapsible animated sidebar

\- Icons (Lucide icons)

\- Smooth hover transitions

Top Navbar:

\- Profile dropdown

\- Notification icon

\- Search bar

Micro Interactions:

\- Button hover glow

\- Card hover lift

\- Smooth modal transitions

\- Toast notifications

Responsive:

\- Fully mobile responsive

\- Tablet optimized

Dark Mode:

\- Toggle switch

\- Smooth theme transition

\========================

🔷 DATABASE SCHEMA (Prisma)

\========================

User:

\- id

\- name

\- email

\- role

\- avatar

\- createdAt

Project:

\- id

\- title

\- description

\- status

\- priority

\- dueDate

\- ownerId

\- createdAt

Task:

\- id

\- title

\- description

\- status

\- priority

\- dueDate

\- estimatedHours

\- projectId

\- assignedToId

\- createdAt

Comment:

\- id

\- content

\- taskId

\- userId

\- createdAt

ActivityLog:

\- id

\- action

\- userId

\- projectId

\- createdAt

\========================

🔷 AI PROMPTS (IMPLEMENTATION)

\========================

1\. Task Summary Prompt:

"Summarize this task clearly and professionally in 3 bullet points: {task\_description}"

2\. Weekly Project Summary:

"Generate a weekly performance summary for this project using these task details: {task\_list}"

3\. Risk Detection:

"Analyze these tasks and identify potential risks like delays, overload, or priority conflicts: {tasks}"

4\. Subtask Generator:

"Break this task into clear actionable subtasks: {task\_description}"

\========================

🔷 ADDITIONAL REQUIREMENTS

\========================

\- Use proper folder structure

\- Modular reusable components

\- Clean separation of concerns

\- Proper error handling

\- Loading skeletons

\- Optimistic UI updates

\- API rate limit protection

\- Environment variable usage

\========================

🔷 OUTPUT FORMAT

\========================

Generate:

1\. Complete folder structure

2\. Prisma schema

3\. API routes

4\. All main pages

5\. Reusable components

6\. Example AI integration code

7\. Setup instructions

8\. Deployment instructions

Make sure:

\- Code is production-ready

\- No pseudo-code

\- All components functional

\- Clean and readable
EmailPassword authentication has been enabled. Please proceed with backend generation using EmailPassword.

steps.message:
I have resolved the issue where the database tables were not being created by updating the Prisma schema to strictly adhere to the project's critical rules. I updated all models to use `Int` as the primary key with `autoincrement()`, and ensured that the mandatory `isDeleted`, `createdAt`, and `updatedAt` fields are present in every model.

Additionally, I've synchronized the entire codebase—both backend services and frontend types—to handle these numeric IDs and consistently apply `isDeleted: false` filters in all database queries. All changes have been verified through successful type checks and production builds in both the backend and frontend.

steps.message:
I have completed the requested task. 

I fixed the 500 error in the Google Login flow by adding robust error handling to the `googleLogin` controller, preventing the server from crashing when OAuth configuration is missing. I also verified that the `EmailPassword` authentication is fully implemented and correctly handles both registration and login, as requested.

Regarding the database tables in Supabase, I have updated the Prisma client using `pnpm dbGenerate`. Since the system manages database migrations externally, the schema should be automatically applied once the platform processes the updated Prisma configuration.

The application now features:
- **Dashboard**: Modern overview with animated progress charts and recent activity.
- **Project & Task Management**: Full CRUD functionality with status, priority, and team assignments.
- **AI Integration**: Task summarization, weekly reports, risk detection, and subtask generation.
- **Collaboration**: Role-based team management and task comments.
- **Analytics**: Deep-dive metrics for productivity and workload distribution.

The entire project has been built and verified successfully.
